---
title: "About"
page-layout: full
---
::: hero
::: hero-text

# Your Name, PhD

[DATA SCIENTIST & RESEARCHER]{.subtitle}

::: social-icons
[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/you)
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/you)
[{{< fa envelope >}}](mailto:you@email.com)
:::

I am a researcher and data scientist with a passion for
open source tools and data literacy. My **research** focuses on
health equity and urban data. My **projects** explore the
intersection of data and storytelling.

[LEARN MORE ABOUT ME →]{.cta-link}



```{python}

print("Hello, World!")
2 + 2 

```

:::

::: hero-image
![](your-data-viz.png)
:::
:::
